missing_episode.title: Missing episode return
steps: Immediate safety and welfare check on return
Manager or on-call notification without delay
Social worker and placing authority contact
Safe and well / return home interview planning
Risk assessment and placement plan review

allegation_against_staff.title: Allegation against staff
steps: Do not investigate — preserve the child's account
Protect the child and manage contact proportionately
Manager and LADO route per local procedures

self_harm.title: Self-harm concern
steps: Suicide and self-harm risk including means and access
Medical and mental health advice route
Safety plan and risk assessment update

restraint.title: Physical intervention / restraint
steps: Injury checks for child and staff

recording_quality.title: Recording quality
steps: Link to care plan and risk plan

professional_boundary_social_media.title: Professional boundary / social media
steps: Reassure in person with safe boundaries

reg44_reg45.title: Reg 44 and Reg 45
steps: Reg 44: independent scrutiny now — triangulation and challenge
Reg 45: provider quality analysis over time — themes and improvement
Separate visitor scrutiny from provider self-evaluation
Evidence actions closed and impact visible

child_voice_mismatch.title: Child voice mismatch with records
steps: Check mismatch between child account and adult records
Advocacy, complaint or safeguarding route if needed
Update plans and show what changed for the child
